get.summary: ListApplications returns paginated applications owned by a user.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

post.summary: CreateApplication creates an application and returns its initial token.

delete.summary: DeleteApplication permanently deletes an application and invalidates its token.

post.summary: RegenerateApplicationToken rotates an application token and returns a new one.

get.summary:
ListArticles returns paginated articles visible to the authenticated user,
optionally filtered by series_id.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

post.summary: CreateArticle creates an article and its initial version.

get.summary: GetArticle returns an article with its current version.

patch.summary: UpdateArticle creates a new article version with provided changes.

addImageIds.description:
Image IDs to append to the article's image list.
Duplicates within this list are silently deduplicated.
If an ID appears in both add_image_ids and remove_image_ids, removal takes precedence.

removeImageIds.description:
Image IDs to remove from the article's image list.
IDs not currently attached to the article are ignored (no-op).
Duplicates within this list are silently deduplicated.
Removal takes precedence over add_image_ids if the same ID appears in both.

get.summary: GetArticleVersions returns paginated version history for an article.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

post.summary: Login authenticates an existing user and returns authentication tokens.
RefreshAccessToken exchanges a refresh token for a new access token.
Register creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens.

get.summary: ListImages returns paginated images visible to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

post.summary: CreateImageUpload creates an image asset and returns a pre-signed upload URL.

get.summary: GetImage returns a single image asset by its identifier.

delete.summary: DeleteImage deletes an image asset and invalidates future usage.

post.summary: FinalizeImageUpload confirms upload completion and returns finalized metadata.

get.summary:
ListPosts returns paginated posts visible to the authenticated user,
optionally filtered by series_id.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

post.summary: CreatePost creates a post and its initial version.

get.summary: GetPost returns a post with its current version.

patch.summary: UpdatePost creates a new post version with provided changes.

addImageIds.description:
Image IDs to append to the post's image list.
Duplicates within this list are silently deduplicated.
If an ID appears in both add_image_ids and remove_image_ids, removal takes precedence.

removeImageIds.description:
Image IDs to remove from the post's image list.
IDs not currently attached to the post are ignored (no-op).
Duplicates within this list are silently deduplicated.
Removal takes precedence over add_image_ids if the same ID appears in both.

get.summary: GetPostVersions returns paginated version history for a post.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

get.summary: ListSeries returns paginated series owned by a user.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in a single page.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_page_token.
Keep it as-is; do not parse or construct it on the client.

post.summary: CreateSeries creates a new writing series for a user.

get.summary: GetSeries returns a series by its unique identifier.

patch.summary: UpdateSeries updates mutable metadata of an existing series.

get.summary: GetWritingContext returns optional series-scoped context and related article/post history.

nextPageToken.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; empty when there are no more results.
Opaque cursor for the next page; empty when there are no more results.

deleted.description:
Always true on a successful response.
If the application does not exist, the server returns a NOT_FOUND error
(gRPC status code 5) instead of a successful response with deleted=false.

Always true on a successful response.
If the image does not exist, the server returns a NOT_FOUND error
(gRPC status code 5) instead of a successful response with deleted=false.

Opaque cursor for the next page; empty when there are no more results.

series.description: Present only when GetWritingContextRequest.series_id is provided.
